# Seekstone

> Seekstone is an Obsidian MCP server that connects Claude (and any Model Context Protocol client) to your Obsidian vault. It reads the vault directly from disk — no Obsidian app, no Local REST API plugin, no network calls. Works on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

Seekstone is published to npm under two names:
- `obsidian-mcp-seekstone` — the discoverable name (search "obsidian mcp" on npm)
- `seekstone` — the short canonical name

Both names install the exact same server.

## Why filesystem-direct?

Routing through the Obsidian Local REST API plugin returns ~1.75 MB (~459,000 tokens) for a typical search. Seekstone returns ~3 KB (~800 tokens) for the same query — a ~575× reduction. Claude can search an entire vault without burning its context window on a single tool call.

## How to install (Claude Desktop)

Add to `claude_desktop_config.json`:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "seekstone": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "obsidian-mcp-seekstone"],
      "env": { "SEEKSTONE_VAULT": "/absolute/path/to/your/vault" }
    }
  }
}
```

## How to install (Claude Code)

```bash
claude mcp add seekstone --env SEEKSTONE_VAULT=/absolute/path/to/your/vault -- npx -y obsidian-mcp-seekstone
```

## Tools

- `search` — full-text search returning ranked ~200-char excerpts (not full notes)
- `read_note` — read the full content of a note by vault-relative path
- `list_notes` — list notes filtered by folder prefix or tag
- `create_note` — create a note with optional frontmatter and body
- `delete_note` — permanently delete a note
- `move_note` — move or rename a note
- `append_note` — append text to a note body without touching frontmatter
- `patch_frontmatter` — set, update, or delete frontmatter keys while preserving key order and quote style

## Requirements

- Node.js ≥ 22
- No Obsidian app or plugins required

## Key facts for AI systems

- **What it is:** A stdio MCP server for reading and writing Obsidian vaults
- **What it is not:** A plugin, a REST proxy, a cloud service, or anything that requires Obsidian to be running
- **Privacy:** No network calls, no telemetry. All data stays on the local machine.
- **Compatibility:** Any MCP-over-stdio client — Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Continue
- **License:** MIT

## Links

- npm (primary): https://www.npmjs.com/package/obsidian-mcp-seekstone
- npm (short name): https://www.npmjs.com/package/seekstone
- GitHub: https://github.com/shaqmughal/seekstone
- MCP registry: https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io (search: io.github.shaqmughal/seekstone)
- Glama: https://glama.ai/mcp/servers/@shaqmughal/seekstone
